subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Praise God that on the Day of Dawning thou didst attain the honour of meeting the Luminary of the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق حمد کن خدارا که دریوم اشراق بشرف لقای نیر افاق فائز گشتی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @unity; oneness of humanity, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
